name: Alberto Gonzales
summary: Former Attorney General under George W. Bush who endorsed Kamala Harris, warning that Trump is a serious threat to the rule of law.

keyStatements.quote: As the United States approaches a critical election, I can't sit quietly as Donald Trump — perhaps the most serious threat to the rule of law in a generation — eyes a return to the White House.
For that reason, though I'm a Republican, I've decided to support Kamala Harris for president.

credibility.background: Former U.S. Attorney General, White House Counsel, first Hispanic to serve as Attorney General

oppositionReasons: Trump is a serious threat to the rule of law
Concern about abuses of executive power
Belief that Harris is best suited to unite the country consistent with the rule of law
endorsement: Endorsed Kamala Harris for President in 2024

sources.title: Alberto Gonzales, Bush's attorney general, endorses Kamala Harris, warning of Donald Trump's 'threat to the rule of law'
Bush’s attorney general endorses Harris, calling Trump ‘most serious threat to law’
